scenarios.name: Protracted Limited Conflict
scenarios.rationale: Diplomatic off-ramp reporting trims limited-war baseline but does not eliminate attrition risk.

scenarios.name: Economic Pressure Ceasefire
scenarios.rationale: Economic pressure and Hormuz bargaining leverage make an interim ceasefire/off-ramp the clearest current pathway.

scenarios.name: Iranian Regime Collapse
scenarios.rationale: Internal stress remains structurally relevant but current accessible signals do not justify a sharp move.

scenarios.name: Regional Conflagration
scenarios.rationale: Regional widening risk falls unless maritime security deployments draw direct attacks.

scenarios.name: Nuclear Threshold
scenarios.rationale: Nuclear issue remains a tail risk because enrichment and stockpile disputes are deferred, not resolved.

scenarios.name: US Domestic Crisis
scenarios.rationale: US domestic shock remains secondary unless oil price or constitutional stress accelerates.

sri_lanka_exposure.near_term_assessment: Mostly macro-fuel exposure unless Colombo feeder schedules or insurance premia deteriorate.

caveats: This is a deterministic reference forecast generated from the current manual research snapshot and source availability checks.
It is not a verified learning update and should not be scored until resolution criteria are reviewed.
Reuters Middle East, IAEA Iran focus, CENTCOM press releases were not reachable during the latest source check.

scenarios.rationale: Economic pressure and Hormuz bargaining leverage make an interim ceasefire/off-ramp the clearest current pathway.

scenarios.name: Iranian Regime Collapse
scenarios.rationale: Internal stress remains structurally relevant but current accessible signals do not justify a sharp move.

scenarios.name: Regional Conflagration
scenarios.rationale: Regional widening risk falls unless maritime security deployments draw direct attacks.

scenarios.name: Nuclear Threshold
scenarios.rationale: Nuclear issue remains a tail risk because enrichment and stockpile disputes are deferred, not resolved.

scenarios.name: US Domestic Crisis
scenarios.rationale: US domestic shock remains secondary unless oil price or constitutional stress accelerates.

sri_lanka_exposure.near_term_assessment: Mostly macro-fuel exposure unless Colombo feeder schedules or insurance premia deteriorate.
